pages.text: An imperfect ritual that removes the $(#5500AA)Blood Enhanced$() mark from an item, returning all enchantment levels to their base values.$(br2)$(bold)Setup:$()$(br)Place a Quartz Block on top of an Imperfect Ritual Stone.$(br2)$(bold)Cost:$() 1000 LP per use$(br2)$(bold)Note:$() The ritual has no persistent effect; it activates once and completes immediately. The stone can be reused.

pages.title: Usage
pages.text: $(bold)Activation:$()$(br)1. Hold a Blood Enhanced item in your mainhand$(br)2. Right-click the Imperfect Ritual Stone$(br)3. The Blood Enhanced mark is removed$(br)4. Enchantments return to their base levels$(br)5. The stone remains for reuse$(br2)$(bold)Applications:$()$(li)Reverse the Enhancement ritual$(li)Remove the +1 level boost$(br2)$(bold)Note:$() Only works on items that have the Blood Enhanced mark. Has no effect on non-enhanced items.$(br2)$(italic)Balance the scales of power.$()
